title: Quixotic - Better Ping Icon (BPI)
description: Simple resource pack that make reading the ping icon easier.
body:
This resource pack makes it easier to see the amount of ping you have on a server. Hope you enjoy :)

How to download and use on Minecraft Java edition:

1. Download the pack.
2. Launch Minecrat 1.21.4 and click on Options -> Resource Packs and drag the pack into Minecraft.


Color meaning:

• Light green = Good Ping

• Dark green = Not so good but still playable

• Yellow = High ping 

• Orange = Very high ping, might not be playable

• Red = ur cooked

Please leave comments if you want anything changed or you want more resource packs.
